name: Green Bean and Mushroom Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 and three quarters pounds Frozen whole green beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet.
2. Add the onion and garlic, and toss briefly.
3. Add the green beans, mushrooms, basil, soy sauce, salt, pepper, dry sherry, and stock.
4. Cover and cook until the beans are heated through, about 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the dissolved cornstarch and heat until thickened.
6. Toss in the tomato wedges and Parmesan cheese, stirring just to combine.
7. Serve immediately.
